_execution_mode.description: **Experimental; added in 9.4.0.** define how to execute the agent (local execution or via task_manager)

action.description: The action to perform. "regenerate" re-executes the last round with the original input. Requires conversation_id.

agent_id.description: The ID of the agent to chat with. Defaults to the default Elastic AI agent.

data.description: Payload of the attachment. Required unless `origin` is provided (content is resolved once at send time).

group_id.description: Stable identifier for the logical group this attachment belongs to. Attachments sharing the same group_id were submitted together as a single logical entity.

hidden.description: When true, the attachment will not be displayed in the UI.

origin.description: Origin string (for example, saved object ID) for by-reference attachments. When provided without `data`, the content is resolved once using the attachment type’s `resolve` hook.

attachments.description: **Technical Preview; added in 9.3.0.** Optional attachments to send with the message.

description.description: Description of what the browser API tool does.

id.description: Unique identifier for the browser API tool.

schema.description: JSON Schema defining the tool parameters (JsonSchema7Type).

browser_api_tools.description: Optional browser API tools to be registered as LLM tools with browser.* namespace. These tools execute on the client side.

visualizations.description: When true, allows the agent to render tabular data from tool results as interactive visualizations using custom XML elements in responses.

capabilities.description: Controls agent capabilities during conversation. Currently supports visualization rendering for tabular tool results.

tools.description: Tool selection to enable for this execution.

configuration_overrides.description: Runtime configuration overrides. These override the stored agent configuration for this execution only.

connector_id.description: Optional connector ID for the agent to use for model routing. Mutually exclusive with `inference_id`; omit or use only one.

conversation_id.description: Optional existing conversation ID to continue a previous conversation.

execution_id.description: Optional client-generated execution ID. Provide it to address this execution later (for example, to abort it). Must be unique; defaults to a server-generated ID.

inference_id.description: Optional inference endpoint ID for model routing (public alias for the same internal identifier as `connector_id`). Mutually exclusive with `connector_id`.

input.description: The user input message to send to the agent.

prompts.description: Use this field to respond to a `confirmation`, `authorization`, or `ask_user_question` prompt. Send an `allow` boolean to answer a `confirmation` prompt, an `authorized` boolean to answer an `authorization` prompt, or an `answers` array (one entry per question) to answer an `ask_user_question` prompt.
